productName: m80 dynalite infused pre-roll double kush cake .5g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Double kush cake, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — an earthy, piney, hashy aroma and a classic, relaxing feel, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
